Title: User B - Finalize kickoff agenda
Description: Align the kickoff agenda and prepare the final version for the project start.

Title: User B - Update stakeholder list
Description: Review and extend the list of key internal and external stakeholders.

Title: User B - Create communication matrix
Description: Define which target groups receive which information and in which format.

Title: User B - Prepare project status report
Description: Prepare an initial template for regular project status reporting.

Title: User B - Plan risk workshop
Description: Prepare the date, participants, and agenda for the risk workshop.

Title: User B - Align meeting calendar
Description: Schedule recurring meetings for the project team and steering activities.

Title: User B - Document roles and responsibilities
Description: Describe the most important project roles in a clear structure.

Title: User B - Prepare budget approval
Description: Collect the material needed for the internal budget approval.

Title: User B - Align project goals
Description: Align the main project goals and expectations with the stakeholders.

Title: User B - Create decision template
Description: Prepare a reusable template for management decisions in the project.

Title: User B - Document escalation path
Description: Define how issues or delays should be escalated in the project.

Title: User B - Prepare steering committee meeting
Description: Prepare the invitation, material, and objective for the next steering committee session.
